detail.description:
Do you love solving challenging yet satisfying puzzles?
Step into the world of Bus Rush Fever!

Bus Rush Fever! combines the excitement of parking games, the challenge of color-sorting games, and the satisfying people. Plan your moves to clear the parking lot congestion and make way for smooth traffic.

Move, park, and collect—every decision matters in this parking jam puzzle.
